name: @yaonyan/acp2openai-ptc
description: Programmatic tool calling plugin and Deno runtime for acp2openai-compatible

scripts.build: tsdown && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly && cp dist/packages/ptc/src/index.d.ts dist/index.d.ts && cp dist/packages/ptc/src/index.d.ts.map dist/index.d.ts.map
